subcodes.first_line: O thou bewildered by the visage of the Friend! In this world there are many lovers of the rosy face, the musky hair, and the salty ruby lips [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آشفته روی دوست در این جهان بسا عاشقان رخ رنگین و موی مشکین و لعل نمکین که
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
